metadata.description: The PASIV device enables shared dreaming. Connect AI agents to extract tested, reviewed implementations from ideas.

plugins.name: pasiv
plugins.description: TDD-first, 3-model review pipeline, autonomous workflows. Inception-inspired solo dev automation.

plugins.name: pasiv-extras
plugins.description: Standalone utilities: repo security scan, first-push repo prep, App Store readiness, de-vibe, image generation. Ad hoc — not loaded by the core workflow.
